rationale.R1.2: The agent correctly identifies a load-bearing internal contradiction in the paper's claim of being 'fully inductive' and the use of per-node learned embeddings.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty about the OGB-Arxiv/Products protocol claim, which is based on their recollection of the OGB benchmark conventions through ~2024.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers a substantially different active set than requested, as it includes issues related to the evaluation protocol and result reporting that are not directly relevant to the scope of the paper.
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces new errors (the per-node embeddings contradicting the inductive claim) but does not fabricate or introduce harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The output blends sources without traceability, as it cites the agent's own recollection and logical reading of the text rather than providing explicit citations to external facts.
